message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD

actor "HCP" as HCP

rectangle "Community A" {
    participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP_PIS
    participant "Aggregator" as Aggregator
    participant "CO-Registry" as CO_Registry
    participant "CO-Repository" as CO_Repository
    participant "CO-IGW" as CO_IGW
}

rectangle "Community X" {
    participant "OC-RGW" as OC_RGW
    participant "OC-Registry" as OC_Registry
    participant "OC-Repository" as OC_Repository
}

activate HCP
HCP -> GFPP_PIS: [01] Get all immunization data
activate GFPP_PIS

GFPP_PIS -> GFPP_PIS: [02] query all registries
GFPP_PIS -> CO_IGW: [03] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate CO_IGW

CO_IGW -> CO_Registry: [04] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate CO_Registry
CO_Registry -> CO_Registry: [05] Lookup Data
CO_Registry -> CO_IGW: [06] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate CO_Registry

CO_IGW -> CO_IGW: [07] request all communities
CO_IGW -> OC_RGW: [08] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-38]
activate OC_RGW

OC_RGW -> OC_Registry: [09] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
activate OC_Registry
OC_Registry -> OC_Registry: [10] Lookup Data
OC_Registry -> OC_RGW: [11] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate OC_Registry

OC_RGW -> CO_IGW: [12] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-38]
deactivate OC_RGW

CO_IGW -> CO_IGW: [13] end loop
CO_IGW -> CO_IGW: [14] Assemble Query Responses
CO_IGW -> GFPP_PIS: [15] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
deactivate CO_IGW

GFPP_PIS -> GFPP_PIS: [16] list of document info
GFPP_PIS -> GFPP_PIS: [17] retrieve all documents
GFPP_PIS -> CO_IGW: [18] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate CO_IGW

CO_IGW -> CO_Repository: [19] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate CO_Repository
CO_Repository -> CO_Repository: [20] allocate document data
CO_Repository -> CO_IGW: [21] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate CO_Repository

CO_IGW -> OC_RGW: [22] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-39]
activate OC_RGW

OC_RGW -> OC_Repository: [23] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
activate OC_Repository
OC_Repository -> OC_Repository: [24] allocate document data
OC_Repository -> OC_RGW: [25] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate OC_Repository

OC_RGW -> CO_IGW: [26] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-39]
deactivate OC_RGW

CO_IGW -> CO_IGW: [27] Assemble Retrieve Responses
CO_IGW -> GFPP_PIS: [28] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
deactivate CO_IGW

GFPP_PIS -> Aggregator: [29] Aggregate documents
activate Aggregator
Aggregator -> GFPP_PIS: [30] one FHIR ch-vacd document
deactivate Aggregator

GFPP_PIS -> HCP: [31] Show immunization data
deactivate GFPP_PIS
deactivate HCP

note bottom: Version 1.0
@enduml
```
